zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry de Audley於1222年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利時，他的父親Henry De Audley47歲，母親Bertrade Mainwaring25歲。他去世於1272年6月11日在英國斯塔福爾奧德利享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry de Audley于1222年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利时，他的父亲Henry De Audley47岁，母亲Bertrade Mainwaring25岁。他去世于1272年6月11日在英国斯塔福爾奧德利享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry de Audley was born in 1222, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry De Audley, was 47 and his mother, Bertrade Mainwaring, was 25. He died on 11 June 1272, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry de Audley est né en 1222, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry De Audley, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Bertrade Mainwaring, avait 25 ans. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1272, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry de Audley 1222 in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry De Audley 47 und seine Mutter Bertrade Mainwaring 25. Er starb am 11. Juni 1272 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Audley, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Audley è nato il nel 1222 nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry De Audley, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Bertrade Mainwaring, aveva 25 anni. Morì il 11 giugno 1272, nel Audley, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Audley(이)가 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De Audley(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertrade Mainwaring(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1272년 6월 11일 영국 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry de Audley родился в 1222 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry De Audley было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertrade Mainwaring, 25. Он умер 11 июня 1272 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.
